_comment: Canonical FluidX3D runtime config. Edit via dashboard or directly. fx3d_run.py copies into iter_dir/case.txt every run (no rebuild needed). Keys with `_` prefix are stripped before runtime.

_doc.nozzle_refill_dt_s: s | host-side nozzle source re-stamp cadence. Keep <= dt_out so inflow behaves like a continuous faucet | 0.01~0.25 | 0.05
_doc.nozzle_refill_col_h: cells | short throat below nozzle kept full every refill. 0=top only, avoid values near seed_col_h because that anchors the whole water column | 0~5 | 3
_doc.nozzle_emit_col_h: cells | diagnostic pulse span below the fixed throat. This is not held full by default | 3~14 | 8
_doc.nozzle_pulse_dt_s: s | cadence for detached droplet packets below the fixed throat. Must remain independent from the top TYPE_E source | 0.05~0.75 | 0.5
_doc.nozzle_pulse_depth_h: cells | packet spawn depth below nozzle top. It must be deeper than nozzle_refill_col_h so top fixed cells alone cannot pass | 4~14 | 7
_doc.nozzle_pulse_layers: cells | locally initialized moving packet thickness below the fixed throat. 0 disables packets | 0~3 | 1
_doc.lbm_u_ref: lattice (dimensionless) | velocity scale -> sets relaxation tau. <=0.1 stable | 0.01~0.1 | 0.05
_doc.side_walls: E|S | E=equilibrium (absorb), S=solid (reflect). E gives transparent rendering | E or S | E
_doc.floor_type: S|E | S=solid floor (pond reflects), E=absorb | S or E | S
_doc.nozzle_LPM: L/min | legacy per-sampled-point flow fallback when nozzle_velocity_mps=0 | 30~300 | 60
_doc.nozzle_mode: all|centroid|downstream_edge|index|stride|analytic_circle | analytic_circle uses one centroid plus nozzle_shape/diameter instead of many sampled mini-nozzles | stride
_doc.nozzle_index: int | used only for nozzle_mode=index to probe a specific sampled inlet point | 0
_doc.nozzle_downstream_blend: 0~1 | for downstream_edge: 0=center, 1=outer rim point toward next module | 0.65
_doc.nozzle_velocity_mps: m/s | direct downward inlet speed. Preferred because env::nozzle is a sampled inlet surface, not independent faucets. 0=derive from nozzle_LPM | 0~12 | 12
_doc.nozzle_velocity_floor_mps: m/s | minimum speed when deriving from nozzle_LPM | 0.5~4 | 1
_doc.nozzle_horizontal_mps: m/s | optional horizontal inlet speed to drive flow toward the next module instead of pooling in the top bowl | 0~8 | 0
_doc.nozzle_horizontal_mode: none|toward_next_module|vector | direction for horizontal inlet velocity | none
_doc.nozzle_horizontal_x: m/s | vector x component direction hint when nozzle_horizontal_mode=vector
_doc.nozzle_horizontal_y: m/s | vector y component direction hint when nozzle_horizontal_mode=vector
_doc.nozzle_area_cells: int | square nozzle footprint fallback = (2r+1)^2 where r = val/2. Ignored by analytic disk/ring nozzles | 1~5 | 3
_doc.nozzle_shape: square|disk|ring | square keeps legacy sampled nozzle cells; ring/disk are for analytic_circle tests | square
_doc.nozzle_diameter_m: m | analytic disk/ring outer diameter at existing nozzle height | 0.2~1.0 | 0.45
_doc.nozzle_ring_width_m: m | ring thickness for nozzle_shape=ring. Use around dp_m so the rim is one lattice cell thick | 0.05~0.25 | 0.12
_doc.seed_col_h: cells | warmup column depth below nozzle (init only, refill maintains). col_h * dp = visible nozzle bar length | 5~30 | 12
_doc.pond_prefill_z_m: m | t=0 pre-fill upper z bound (z<=this filled with TYPE_F). 0=off | 0~5 | 0
_doc.pond_prefill_z_bot_m: m | t=0 pre-fill lower z bound (band-style). 0=half-open | 0~30 | 0
_doc.pond_prefill_xy_bbox_m: [x_lo,y_lo,x_hi,y_hi] m | xy constraint for prefill. [0,0,0,0]=off | bbox | [0,0,0,0]
_doc.surface_tension_Npm: N/m | water=0.072 @ 20C. 0=disable (verified stable for cascade target scoring) | 0~0.1 | 0
_doc.viscosity_m2ps: m^2/s | kinematic viscosity. water=1e-6. 1e-5 is the verified stable cascade profile at dp=0.1 | 1e-7~1e-4 | 1e-5
_doc.camera: [rx,ry,fov,zoom] | rotation deg + FOV deg + zoom factor | - | [200,15,60,1]
_doc.push_to_rhino: bool | post-sim, push sculpture STL to Rhino via MCP | true/false | true
_doc.thicken_thickness_m: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | thicken_collider.py thickness for open mesh closing
_doc.score_slab_thickness_m: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | fx3d_postprocess.py positive/negative slab inflation
_doc.floor_hit_band_m: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | floor arrival diagnostic band above z=0. Defaults to score_slab_thickness_m
_doc.fluid_threshold: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | phi cutoff for retention counts in postprocess
_doc.domain_pad_m: [POSTPROCESS — does not affect sim] | fx3d_run.py computes domain_bbox_m with this padding around sculpture bbox
_doc.collider_stl_path: path | optional collider STL override used by fx3d_run.py. Relative paths resolve from repo root | env_fx3d/runs/_cascade_sx0_y1.stl
_doc.module_bboxes_path: path | optional module bbox JSON matching collider_stl_path, used for cascade/retention scoring | env_fx3d/runs/_cascade_sx0_y1_modules.json
